{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=To run for the president, the owner of a pharmaceutical company sprayed dangerous substances all over the city, polluting some Snail Shell. Then the owner created a cure to modify the minds of activists in jail.
|affct=TECH
|hard=RUSH
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.2%)
|color=purple
|earth=6
|water=6
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Mecha
|element=Earth
|realm=Hellas
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
